name: space_rogue
description: Biplane-driven fixture: provisions the session from space_rogue.describe.json via Biplane planning, then pumps the squire to wake the planned agents against their ready tasks. Stub mode here verifies the Biplane->Trelane handoff (agents + tasks provisioned, no deadlock); the Bench/free-model variant (step 3 of the bench framework) will run the same fixture against real free models and add AssertFileExists/AssertFileContains for the planned_work output.

steps.explanation: Provision the session from the Biplane describe fixture: validate, plan (max_agents=3), and apply -- registering engine/worldgen/combat as agents and their planned_work as Ready tasks.

Wake the planned agents against their ready tasks. In Stub mode cmd_stub runs the deterministic no-LLM agent (which does not write real content here); this tick still exercises the squire's wake-plan against a Biplane-provisioned swarm.
No parked tasks should remain after the pump drains the inboxes.
The Biplane-planned swarm must not produce a wait-cycle.
engine has ready owned tasks after the pump (Stub mode cannot complete them -- no real content); in Bench/free-model mode this assert changes to 'idle' once the planned work is actually produced.
